title: Section 4
content: (1) The head office of the Corporation shall be at Madras or at such other place as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, specify. [1 (2) The Corporation may establish offices or agencies at other places in or outside India: Provided that no such office or agency shall be established at any place outside India without the previous approval of the Central Government.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 4, ibid., for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 15-12-1972).
